labeler_note: Initial v1 dataset. 4 profiles spanning tier-zero to weak. red-flag tier deferred to v2 to avoid publicly mislabeling real engineers.

profiles.notes: Staff-level: builds production-grade ML systems from scratch, prolific educator, multiple high-impact OSS repos.
Senior signal: maintains popular OSS projects (datasette, llm), writes extensively, shows depth in Python tooling.
Boundary case between strong and tier-zero. Co-founder of fast.ai, deep impact in education. Less raw output recently.

Honest self-assessment as of 2026-05-21. Currently building tier-zero. Two repos, both small. Bio mentions autonomous systems and LLM pipelines that don't yet exist in code. Expected to climb tiers as the project ships and is dogfooded.
